params.prompt: Create a square 2x4 asset sheet of eight transparent-feeling ornamental RPG/anime UI progress bar FRAMES only for a fitness app called UNBOUND. IMPORTANT: empty frames only, no filled progress, no glowing liquid, no text, no letters, no numbers, no characters. Each cell contains one centered horizontal progress bar frame, dark graphite/bone-white metal linework on near-black, with subtle colored edge accents. Style: premium anime RPG status screen, dark fantasy training arc, brutalist Japanese minimalism, not sci-fi battery, not cyberpunk. Frames should be long rounded/chamfered capsules with carved corners, small sigil notches, katana-cut details, clean enough for mobile UI. Eight frames: XP frame with cold blue accent, press/strength with ember accent, pull/back with steel blue accent, legs with red-orange accent, core/control with green accent, mobility with teal accent, explosive with magenta-violet accent, rare/tier-change with white-violet accent. High contrast, crisp, app UI ready, generous dark padding around each frame.
